introSection: Honey Harbour is a steel roller coaster located at Energylandia is Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It was built by Vekoma. It opened with Sweet Valley on 27 April 2024.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The addition of Honey Harbour was announced in October 2021. The coaster is part of a new themed area called Sweet Valley.

fullText:
Honey Harbour is a steel roller coaster located at Energylandia is Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It was built by Vekoma. It opened with Sweet Valley on 27 April 2024.

The addition of Honey Harbour was announced in October 2021. The coaster is part of a new themed area called Sweet Valley.
